select.value: Select a.EMP_ID,a.EMP_NM,a.MEASURE_DT,a.BIZ_TYPE_ID,a.BIZ_TYPE_NM,a.SCORE,b.ORG_ID,b.ORG_NM,b.BRANCH_ORG_ID,b.BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T2_EMP_OTHER_BIZ a left join ibs.T5_EMP b on a.EMP_ID=b.EMP_ID WHERE {#condition#} order by a.EMP_ID

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}

@{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

select.value: Select a.EMP_ID,a.EMP_NM,a.MEASURE_DT,a.BIZ_TYPE_ID,a.BIZ_TYPE_NM,a.SCORE,b.ORG_ID,b.ORG_NM,b.BRANCH_ORG_ID,b.BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T2_EMP_OTHER_BIZ a left join ibs.T5_EMP b on a.EMP_ID=b.EMP_ID WHERE {#condition#}

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

select.value: Select a.EMP_ID,a.EMP_NM,a.MEASURE_DT,a.BIZ_TYPE_ID,a.BIZ_TYPE_NM,a.SCORE,b.ORG_ID,b.ORG_NM,b.BRANCH_ORG_ID,b.BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T2_EMP_OTHER_BIZ a left join ibs.T5_EMP b on a.EMP_ID=b.EMP_ID WHERE {#condition#}

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}

select.value: Select a.EMP_ID,a.EMP_NM,a.MEASURE_DT,a.BIZ_TYPE_ID,a.BIZ_TYPE_NM,a.SCORE,b.ORG_ID,b.ORG_NM,b.BRANCH_ORG_ID,b.BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T2_EMP_OTHER_BIZ a left join ibs.T5_EMP b on a.EMP_ID=b.EMP_ID WHERE {#condition#}
